assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c -> v128:7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c -> v128:7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c7b4d7f6c
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:ff2f592dff2f592dff2f592dff2f592d -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915b -> v128:b4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915b
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165 -> v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165 -> v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152 -> v128:b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915b -> v128:b4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915b
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165 -> v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165 -> v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152 -> v128:b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915b -> v128:b4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915bb4a2915b
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165 -> v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165 -> v128:b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165b4a21165
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152 -> v128:b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152b4a21152
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:0000c07f0000c07f0000c07f0000c07f -> v128_lanes:f32x4:c,c,c,c
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:0000c0ff0000c0ff0000c0ff0000c0ff -> v128_lanes:f32x4:c,c,c,c
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:0000a07f0000a07f0000a07f0000a07f -> v128_lanes:f32x4:a,a,a,a
assert_return f32x4.nearest v128:0000a0ff0000a0ff0000a0ff0000a0ff -> v128_lanes:f32x4:a,a,a,a
